name: Marker.io

seo.title: Marker.io Review 2026: Pricing, Alternatives & Lock-in Score

review.verdict: Marker.io is a Crash Reporting tool.
pros: Real-time error alerts with full stack traces
cons: Event-volume pricing can surprise at scale
